message:
fix: startup data repairs, auto-mark-read on fetch, test fixes

DB pool (pool.rs):
- Add startup_data_repairs() that runs before pool connections are
  handed out: drops legacy inbox_stats triggers, rebuilds inbox_stats
  from ground truth, and fixes mixed-scale timestamps (seconds/millis
  → microseconds) left by the Python server.
- Fix auto-recovery test to use a real valid SQLite backup instead of
  dummy bytes, so ensure_sqlite_file_healthy actually verifies the
  restored DB contents.

Migration (migrate.rs):
- Remove redundant table-existence check in detect_timestamp_format;
  the typeof query already fails gracefully on missing tables, and
  the sqlite_master query was unreliable on FrankenSQLite.
- Drop unused sqlmodel_core::Value import.

Queries (queries.rs):
- Fix test configs: remove unnecessary `mut` on DbPoolConfig bindings.
- Switch test migrations from migrate_to_latest to
  migrate_to_latest_base to match the updated schema API.
- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] to long test function.

Server (lib.rs):
- Add debug println for compose dispatch errors.
- Update test schema and INSERT to include recipients_json column
  added in the latest migration.

Analytics TUI (analytics.rs):
- Move MailScreenId import from top-level use to #[cfg(test)] block
  to fix unused-import warning in non-test builds.

Messaging tools (messaging.rs):
- Auto-mark fetched messages as read (and auto-ack if ack_required)
  during fetch_inbox, since agents consistently fail to call
  mark_message_read explicitly. Best-effort: errors are logged but
  don't fail the fetch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
